title: The Bone Vault
author: Tiwas Demo
description: A short delve beneath the ruined town of Hollowmere. Three scenes, three foes — enough to put a freshly-rolled hero through the exertion engine.

scenes.title: 1. The Sunken Gate
scenes.narrative: Floodwater laps at a half-buried iron gate. A goblin scout perched on the lintel looses an arrow the moment you step into the open. Roll Reflexes to take cover, or Might to wrench the gate aside.

scenes.title: 2. The Drowned Guardroom
scenes.narrative: A town guard, long dead but still patrolling out of grim habit, levels a rusted spear. The water here is waist-deep and cold — every strained roll bleeds you faster.

scenes.title: 3. The Bone Vault
scenes.narrative: At the heart of the ruin an Arcane Lich turns its hollow gaze upon you. Its Mind-Spike reaches across the chamber. Manage your pools — overreaching here will burn your own life force.

npcs.name: Goblin Scout
npcs.special: Minion: drops at 0 HP or any hit >= 12 damage. Pack Evades as one roll.

npcs.name: Town Guard
npcs.special: Hold the Line: may Block as a free Reaction once per round.

npcs.name: Arcane Lich
npcs.special: Phylactery: at 0 HP drops but is not destroyed unless the phylactery is broken. Owl-Ward folded into Armor 6.
